## Clean sample for MemPalace pre-ingest filter
##
## This is ordinary conversation content. The filter MUST let it through.
## If it ever starts failing, either the filter is too aggressive or a new
## pattern overreached — investigate before shipping.

CEO asked: what storage strategy did we pick for MemPalace?

COO: Option B+ — live ~/.mempalace/ on FileVault-encrypted Mac, nightly
age-encrypted tarball to GDrive _backups/mempalace/. Private key in Apple
Keychain Secure Note. SQLite on GDrive corrupts within days because of
lock-file and multi-file transaction semantics, so the live DB stays off
GDrive entirely. Backups are binary blobs, gitignored.

Decision rationale: we trade one manual Keychain step during setup for
disaster recovery that works even if the Mac dies.

Chef reminded us Makro delivers on Mondays — unrelated to this thread but
captured for context.
